mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, password, name, gender, phone, email, address, role, account_status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE name = #{name} AND email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (login_id, password, name, gender, phone, email, address) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address})
mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, password, name, gender, phone, email, address, role, account_status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, login_id, password, name, gender, phone, email, address, role, account_status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND name = #{name} AND email = #{email}
